original_image_tags: Scan of the reverse side of a document page. The paper is off-white, showing aging and some discoloration. Three hole-punch marks are visible along the top edge (two large circular holes, one smaller irregular hole). The bottom half of the page features two faded, reversed blue ink stamps, indicating they were applied to the other side of the page. The stamps are oriented vertically.

elements.description: Page containing two blue ink stamps and two black hole-punch marks. The bottom stamp reads 'RECEIVED AUG 7 122 PM #52 INTERNAL SECURITY SM FBI U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. The top stamp reads 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE F.B.I. REG. ESPIONAGE AUG 14 9 23 AM #3'.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text from two stamps while Description A claims the stamps are reversed and illegible, indicating a clear contradiction on the visual content's readability and orientation.
